abilities.text: Your defense roll against the first attack against you each round gains +1. Before you make a defense roll, you may discard this card. If you do, your defense roll gains +4.

cards.name: BAND OF MERRIE MEN

abilities.text: Before initiative is determined each round, roll one die. If the result is less than 4, add that amount to your first attack roll of the round. If the result is 4 or greater, add that amount to your initiative for the round.
